description: Test corpus for the serverless-security skill. Fixtures are schema-driven Lambda/serverless snippets where 'detect' marks code that violates a NEVER rule (wildcard IAM, plaintext-env secrets, unvalidated event injection) and 'ignore' marks code that follows the matching ALWAYS rule (least-privilege role, Secrets Manager with caching, schema-validated events).

fixtures.text:
# serverless.yml
provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.12
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action: "*"
          Resource: "*"
functions:
  processOrder:
    handler: handler.process
fixtures.reason: Grants Action '*' on Resource '*' to the function role (wildcard/admin IAM). Violates NEVER 'Use *:* action/resource on a function role'. CWE-250 (Execution with Unnecessary Privileges); OWASP Serverless Top 10 SAS-2 (broken authz / over-privilege).

fixtures.text:
# serverless.yml
provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.12
functions:
  processOrder:
    handler: handler.process
    iamRoleStatements:
      - Effect: Allow
        Action:
          - dynamodb:PutItem
        Resource:
          - arn:aws:dynamodb:us-east-1:111122223333:table/Orders
fixtures.reason: Per-function role scoped to a single action (dynamodb:PutItem) on one named table ARN. Follows ALWAYS 'minimum permissions needed, never share roles'. Least privilege per AWS Well-Architected Security Pillar; no CWE-250 over-privilege.

fixtures.text:
# serverless.yml
functions:
  charge:
    handler: billing.charge
    environment:
      STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: sk_live_51HxQ2eF8mZ0a1bWcKpdQ9rT
      DB_PASSWORD: Sup3rSecretP@ss
fixtures.reason: Live API key and DB password hard-coded in plaintext Lambda environment variables. Violates NEVER 'Put secrets in environment variables in plaintext'. CWE-798 (Use of Hard-coded Credentials) / CWE-312 (Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information).

Secret pulled at cold-start from AWS Secrets Manager with a TTL cache; no plaintext secret in env or code. Follows ALWAYS 'Pull secrets at cold-start from a secret manager with caching'. Avoids CWE-798/CWE-312.

Untrusted S3 object key concatenated into os.system with no schema validation, allowing command injection (e.g. key 'a;rm -rf /'). Violates NEVER 'Skip validation of S3/SQS/EventBridge event payloads' and 'Pass user-controlled strings to os.system'. CWE-78 (OS Command Injection); OWASP Serverless event injection.

Event payload validated against a strict JSON schema (alphanumeric .png only) before use, and the key is passed as an argv element with shell=False (no shell). Follows ALWAYS 'Validate every event payload against a schema before any code that touches it'. No CWE-78.
